CustomField.description: Identifies which Salesforce object the Source Developer Name refers to so EntitlementService can route to the correct query path. PermissionSet -> PermissionSet.Name + PermissionSetAssignment; PermissionSetGroup -> PermissionSetGroup.DeveloperName + PermissionSetAssignment; Profile -> Profile.Name + User.ProfileId.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Choose how to resolve the Source Developer Name: against a Permission Set, a Permission Set Group, or a Profile.
CustomField.label: Entitlement Type
